author: Dwindled
text:
§11 delivery plugin prime.post worktree re-materialization

Per-session re-materialization for still-claimed tasks (spec bl-2e26 §11/§12).
prime is diffless (§13) and carries no single ball, so the plugin scans the
terminus checkout for every tasks/<id>.md still claimed by the actor and runs
the same materialize act claim.post performs — driven per-claimed-task instead
of per-op-id. Create-if-absent keeps it idempotent: a re-prime converges.

- delivery_repo::claimed_ids reads the operating checkout's tasks/, filtering on
  Task::claimant; non-.md and unparseable balls are skipped (best-effort).
- dispatch matrix gains prime in the materialize arm: (claim | prime, post,
  false) => materialize, one arm expressing 'prime re-materializes exactly as
  claim materializes'.
- bl-delivery binary takes a prime branch that loops claimed_ids -> one dispatch
  per id; Wire gains actor + binding.operating (optional, absent on per-ball ops).
- PROTOCOL_JSON declares prime so install wires the plugin into prime.post.

100% coverage, clippy clean, all files under 300 lines.
